---
title: Publications
---
These are my publications, including the undergraduate honors thesis for nostalgia.

<style>
  .publist ol {
    list-style: none;
    padding-left: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .publist ol > li {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    padding-left: 0;
  }

  .pub-marker {
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-right: 0.25rem;
  }

  .publist ol > li p {
    margin: 0;
  }

  .publist a {
    font-weight: 700;
  }
</style>

:::{.publist}

{{< include ../cv/_sections/publications-shared.qmd >}}
1. **Evanns Morales-Cuadrado**, "[Learning-Based Minimum Time-Energy Path Planning Through Integral Reinforcement Learning for a Multivehicle Nonlinear System Subject to Unknown Disturbances and Collision Avoidance](https://mavmatrix.uta.edu/honors_spring2022/60/)" Undergraduate Honors College Thesis at UT Arlington, 2022.

:::
\* *indicates equal contribution*

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var list = document.querySelector('.publist ol');
  if (!list) return;

  var items = Array.prototype.slice.call(list.children);
  var total = items.length;

  items.forEach(function (item, index) {
    var marker = document.createElement('span');
    marker.className = 'pub-marker';
    marker.textContent = '[' + (total - index) + '] ';
    var paragraph = item.querySelector(':scope > p');
    if (paragraph) {
      paragraph.insertBefore(marker, paragraph.firstChild);
    } else {
      item.insertBefore(marker, item.firstChild);
    }
  });
});
</script>
